sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99553" key="sunastragali/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναστρᾰγᾰλίζω</orth>, <sense id="n99553.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play at</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀστράγαλοι</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:9:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
